markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Pete Alonso records 4+ hits in the Chicago WS vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026 at 12:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Pete Alonso is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Pete Alonso starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Pete Alonso is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Pete Alonso is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Pete Alonso: 4+ hits?
